items.name: Builders Club
items.description:
Bold, loud, and colored for maximum impact — the Red with Black Outrageous Builders Club Hard Hat brings builder legacy into full vintage form. With its striking red shell, black accents, and oversized construction visor, it’s perfect for retro avatars, throwback build roleplay, and collectors who thrive on golden-era Roblox gear.

⚙️ More Retro Builder Hats:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=hard+hat&Category=11&CreatorName=Classic+Limiteds&salesTypeFilter=1

✅ Join the Group:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/12034553/Classic-Limiteds#!/about

🏛️ Classic Limiteds

items.name: Certified Baller Hoodie (Red)
items.description:
Redeem this free UGC item by receiving a unique code from the Lootbloc newsletter and redeem it in "Avatar Outfit Creator"!

Redeem Here: https://www.roblox.com/games/10810086665/Avatar-Outfit-Creator

How to:
1. Signup for the newsletter from Lootbloc
2. Confirm your subscription in your inbox
3. When you receive a unique code, join Avatar Outfit Creator
4. Navigate to the Lootbloc homestore and enter
5. When inside, walk up to the "CODES" console
6. Redeem your code and claim your item!

Shop on Lootbloc!
